word: G422 - ἀνεπαίσχυντος - anepaíschyntos - an-ep-ah'-ee-skhoon-tos - Not ashamed

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
hating no cause to be ashamed

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of a compound of G1909 and G153; not ashamed, that is, (by implication) irreprehensible: - that neededth not to be ashamed.
